title: Duplicating the same item over and over and over BUG
excerpt:
Hello, 
We’re having one lead that keeps copying itself forever.

posts.author: hbsfrance (Pierre)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
We’re having one lead that keeps copying itself forever.

Screenshot 2021-10-20 at 10.02.361920×768 76 KB

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @hbsfrance

Sorry to hear you’re having issues here with an item duplicating itself!
Can you share with us a screenshot of your automations that exist on the board, as well as any integrations?
This is usually the culprit of the issue in most cases

If you’d prefer, you can also reach out to our support team at support@monday.com who will be happy to continue to assist here.

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @hbsfrance

Just wanted to check in to see if you were still having issues with the item duplicating itself?
We’d be happy to assist here!

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
I hope the answers in this thread are useful!
As we haven’t had any updates here, I’m going to go ahead and mark this thread as closed.

If you have any additional questions or you feel your original query wasn’t resolved, please feel free to let us know and we’ll be happy to continue to assist!

Best,

Dani
